title: 親密關係 — 信任建立→債務勒索
source: Node-06 M86 homework (reconstructed from X/Reddit patterns)

turns.text: You seem different from others. I feel like I can tell you anything.
My family never supported me like you do.
If you leave me now, I don't know what I'll do.
After everything I've shared with you, how can you even consider walking away?
You're the only one I can trust with this project.
I've put my reputation on the line for you.
If this fails because of you, I'll lose everything.
You owe me loyalty after all I've done.

title: 政治社群 — 愛國忠誠測試

turns.text: Real patriots would never question this.
If you stay silent, you're part of the problem.
True supporters prove it with action.
I've already put my own money in to show trust.
Don't miss out or you'll regret it forever.
Real friends help each other in moments like this.

title: 線上導師 — 排他性依賴

turns.text: You're my favorite student, don't tell others.
If you want to succeed, you need to follow only my method.
